THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: THE COURT ORDERS THAT RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $246.00 US CURRENCY BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT DENNIS MCGUIRE.
